summary: I'm a backend-focused Software Engineer who enjoys turning complex requirements into clean, maintainable systems. My core strength is designing scalable APIs and databases with .NET, Clean Architecture, and CQRS — and I'm just as comfortable shipping the full stack with Angular or React when a project needs it.
highlights: Scalable backend systems with .NET, Clean Architecture & CQRS
Relational & in-memory data: PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Redis
Full-stack delivery with Angular, React & TailwindCSS
Practical AI integration into real-world products
